nodes.name: todolist
nodes.summary: TodoListMiddleware injects todo state into messages and provides the write_todos tool.

nodes.name: TodoListMiddleware
nodes.summary: Middleware managing todo list in AgentState; injects formatted todos before agent runs.

nodes.name: WriteTodosTool
nodes.summary: Tool implementation for creating/updating todo items with validation.

nodes.name: format_todos
nodes.summary: Formats TodoItem slice as XML-like <todos> block for prompt injection.

nodes.name: tool_sanitizer
nodes.summary: ToolResultSanitizerMiddleware wraps tool results in delimited XML blocks (ADR-103 C3) to prevent prompt injection.

nodes.name: ToolResultSanitizerMiddleware
nodes.summary: Wraps tool_call results in <tool_output> blocks, escaping nested closing tags.

nodes.name: escape_xml_attr
nodes.summary: Escapes &, <, >, " in XML attribute values.

nodes.name: unicode_security_middleware
nodes.summary: Middleware that applies Unicode security checks to tool inputs and outputs.

nodes.name: UnicodeSecurityMiddleware
nodes.summary: Detects/sanitizes BiDi, zero-width, confusables on tool calls and optionally user input.

nodes.name: unicode_security
nodes.summary: Detection and mitigation for BiDi controls, zero-width chars, Cyrillic homoglyphs, mixed scripts.

nodes.name: UnicodeIssue
nodes.summary: Enum of detected Unicode security issues: BidiControl, ZeroWidth, Confusable, MixedScript, HomoglyphAttack.

nodes.name: UnicodeSecurityConfig
nodes.summary: Configuration toggling BiDi/zero-width/confusable/mixed-script/homoglyph checks.

nodes.name: UnicodeSecurityChecker
nodes.summary: Checker that scans text and reports/sanitizes Unicode-based attack vectors.

nodes.name: utils
nodes.summary: Utility helpers: SystemPromptBuilder (ADR-103 A5) and append_to_system_message.

nodes.name: SystemPromptBuilder
nodes.summary: Efficient prompt builder using SmallVec; defers concatenation until build() with single allocation.

nodes.name: append_to_system_message
nodes.summary: Appends text to an optional system message, joining with double newline.

nodes.name: witness
nodes.summary: WitnessMiddleware logs each tool call to a SHA3-hashed witness chain (ADR-103 B3, ADR-106 RVF format).

nodes.name: WitnessEntry
nodes.summary: Single witness chain entry with tool_name, arguments_hash, timestamp, sequence, latency, policy check.

nodes.name: WitnessBuilder
nodes.summary: Thread-safe builder accumulating witness entries; supports RVF wire-format output.

nodes.name: WitnessMiddleware
nodes.summary: Middleware recording tool calls with SHA3-256 argument hashes to a shared WitnessBuilder.

nodes.name: compute_arguments_hash
nodes.summary: SHA3-256 hash of JSON-serialized tool args, using LUT-based hex encoding.

nodes.name: truncate_hash_to_8
nodes.summary: Decodes up to 16 hex chars into an 8-byte array with no allocation.

nodes.name: hitl_tests
nodes.summary: Integration tests for HumanInTheLoopMiddleware: pattern matching, wildcards, prefix patterns, model-call filtering.

nodes.name: mcp_bridge_tests
nodes.summary: Integration tests for McpBridgeMiddleware covering config, allowlists, status tool, enable/disable behavior.

nodes.name: pipeline_tests
nodes.summary: Integration tests for MiddlewarePipeline ordering, before_agent chain, wrap_model_call chain, tool injection.

nodes.name: prompt_caching_tests
nodes.summary: Integration tests for PromptCachingMiddleware system/tools cache_control behavior.

nodes.name: security_middleware_tests
nodes.summary: Middleware-layer security tests for tool result sanitization, injection detection, YAML/skill name validation.

nodes.name: security_tests
nodes.summary: Security integration tests: sanitizer, witness chain, skill name validation, patch tool calls, memory trust.

nodes.name: summarization_tests
nodes.summary: Integration tests for SummarizationMiddleware auto-compact triggering and UUID-based offload filenames (SEC-015).

nodes.name: unicode_security_integration
nodes.summary: Integration tests for Unicode security: BiDi attacks, homoglyph phishing, zero-width steganography, mixed scripts.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Manifest for rvagent-subagents crate; depends on rvagent-core, backends, middleware, tools.

nodes.name: CRDT_MERGE.md
nodes.summary: Documentation of CRDT merge architecture: vector clocks, LWW registers, deterministic conflict resolution (ADR-103 B7).

nodes.name: crdt_merge_demo
nodes.summary: Demo of merging parallel subagent state via CRDT with conflict resolution and causal ordering.

nodes.name: builder
nodes.summary: Compiles SubAgentSpec into CompiledSubAgent with isolated graph and capability-based middleware pipeline.

nodes.name: compile_subagents
nodes.summary: Compile a list of SubAgentSpec into runnable CompiledSubAgents.

nodes.name: compile_single
nodes.summary: Compile one spec, building graph, middleware pipeline, and backend.

nodes.name: build_graph
nodes.summary: Build graph node list (start, agent, optional tool_dispatch, end) for a subagent.

nodes.name: build_middleware_pipeline
nodes.summary: Build middleware list based on can_read/write/execute capabilities plus safe parent middleware.

nodes.name: resolve_backend
nodes.summary: Pick backend: local_shell for execute, parent cwd for write, read_only otherwise.

nodes.name: resolve_tools
nodes.summary: Resolve tool list — explicit spec tools or inherited parent tools filtered by capability.

nodes.name: crdt_merge
nodes.summary: CRDT state merging for parallel subagents: VectorClock + LwwRegister + CrdtState (ADR-103 B7).

nodes.name: MergeError
nodes.summary: Errors for CRDT merges: DuplicateNodeId, EmptyResultSet, Internal.

nodes.name: VectorClock
nodes.summary: Vector clock tracking causal ordering of events across nodes via per-node logical timestamps.

nodes.name: LwwRegister
nodes.summary: Last-Write-Wins register; resolves conflicts by timestamp with node_id tie-breaker.

nodes.name: CrdtState
nodes.summary: CRDT state map of LWW registers per key with deterministic merge semantics.

nodes.name: merge_subagent_results
nodes.summary: Merge multiple subagent CrdtStates into a parent state, enforcing unique node IDs.

nodes.name: lib
nodes.summary: Crate root for rvagent-subagents: SubAgentSpec, CompiledSubAgent, SubAgentResult, state isolation utilities.

nodes.name: RvAgentConfig
nodes.summary: Minimal parent agent config (default_model, tools, middleware, cwd) passed to subagent compilation.

nodes.name: SubAgentSpec
nodes.summary: Declarative subagent specification with capabilities, tools, model override, and instructions.

nodes.name: CompiledSubAgent
nodes.summary: Compiled subagent containing spec, graph, middleware pipeline, and backend.

nodes.name: SubAgentResult
nodes.summary: Outcome of subagent execution: name, result_message, tool_calls_count, duration.

nodes.name: prepare_subagent_state
nodes.summary: Build child state by stripping EXCLUDED_STATE_KEYS and injecting task description as a human message.

nodes.name: extract_result_message
nodes.summary: Pull final message content out of subagent's result AgentState.

nodes.name: merge_subagent_state
nodes.summary: Merge non-excluded keys from subagent result back into parent AgentState.

nodes.name: orchestrator
nodes.summary: SubAgentOrchestrator: spawn/parallel execution with result validation (ADR-097, ADR-103 A2).

nodes.name: SubAgentOrchestrator
nodes.summary: Orchestrates execution of compiled subagents with SubAgentResultValidator.

nodes.name: SpawnError
nodes.summary: Errors during subagent spawn: SubAgentNotFound, ValidationFailed, ExecutionFailed.

nodes.name: spawn_parallel
nodes.summary: Async parallel spawn entry point for multiple subagents; sequentially executed stub today.

nodes.name: prompts
nodes.summary: Prompt constants and formatting for subagent task tool and handoff messages.

nodes.name: format_handoff_spawn
nodes.summary: Format handoff message when spawning a subagent.

nodes.name: format_handoff_result
nodes.summary: Format handoff message with completed subagent result.

nodes.name: build_task_tool_description
nodes.summary: Render TASK_TOOL_DESCRIPTION with concrete agent name/description list.
